text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a very successful performance beneath an
underpass, Smart Falcon is seeing off her fans.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for coming, everyone! I'll see
you all at the next one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: E-erm... Hey, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeees? ☆
...Oh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You were in the back row... with the handmade
fan, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? Y-you... you remember? There were so
many people, but you remember me? How come?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You made that fan just for today, didn't you?
That makes me super happy. ☆ Thanks for always
showing up to my performances. ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
No waaay! You're a goddess among goddesses! I
can't believe you remembered me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't exaggerate! ☆ Anyways, you had
something to tell me, right?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right! I was just wondering if you'd
record a message of support for my childhood
friend... Unless that's too much to ask...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's just, my friend is a huge fan of yours as well,
but she's too busy to leave our hometown...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's no trouble at all! I'll be her very own
cheerleader!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Y-y-you're seriously an angel sent from heaven...
My friend has been stressing out and feeling
down, but this will definitely cheer her up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry to hear that. Here's hoping my voice
can lift her spirits a little.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know! I've got a better idea than just recording a
message! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What would you say if I told you I'd put on a
winning concert near where your friend lives?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I-if you did that, she'd be able to come too!
B-b-but... why would you go that far for us?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'd do anything for my fans! That's what being an
Umadol is all about!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: Faaa... Fal... Falcooo!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: I-i-incre... Incredible! Beyond incredible! I... I can't breathe... Gasp...
choice_data_list: B-by the way, where exactly is your hometown?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... right! Sorry! I'm from Hokkaido! Would you
be able to come to the racecourse in Sapporo or
Hakodate?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Hokkaido? ♪ I bet if I ate some delicious
cheese and crab before a concert, I'd never run
out of energy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer? We can go, riiight?
choice_data_list:
I'll try and work something out with your
schedule!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! I'll be aiming for center stage, so make
sure you're there cheering me on! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Smart Falcon promises she'll appear in
a winning concert near her fan's hometown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time to put together a strategy to claim center
stage at either Sapporo or Hakodate.

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... right! Sorry! I'm from Yamagata! Would you
be able to come to the racecourse in Fukushima,
Morioka, or Niigata?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Yamagata?! ♪ The air there is so fresh! I
bet it would feel amazing to do a concert
there. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer? We can go, riiight?
choice_data_list:
I'll try and work something out with your
schedule!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon

sure you're there cheering me on! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time to put together a strategy to claim center
stage at Fukushima, Morioka, or Niigata.

text_block_list.text:

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Chiba?! ♪ I bet I could really kill it at the

stew! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Kansai? I bet crowds would really get

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wooow, Fukuoka? ♪ There are so many cute girls

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
